steps.title: Set up the population density formula
steps.content:
Population density tells us people per unit area. The relationship is:
$$\text{Population Density} = \frac{\text{Population}}{\text{Area}}$$
Rearranging to solve for area:
$$\text{Area} = \frac{\text{Population}}{\text{Population Density}}$$

steps.title: Substitute and divide
steps.content:
Substituting the given values:
$$\text{Area} = \frac{92,400}{280}$$
Divide: $92,400 \div 280 = 330$ square miles.

That matches Choice C — $330$.
